reasoning: The flagged script (f3write.h2w) is not executed during package build/install. PKGBUILD and Makefile are safe; all source files are legitimate flash testing tools.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen incorrectly flagged a non-executed script as malicious due to misinterpreted shell syntax
coverage_issues: deepseek skipped scripts directory; Qwen reviewed it but misjudged relevance
false_positives: Qwen: scripts/f3write.h2w - Normal helper script, not executed during makepkg. HTML entities in report caused misinterpretation.
learnings: Improve file prioritization: Focus on build/install hooks over test scripts
Enhance context awareness: Distinguish between build-time vs user-executed scripts
Fix HTML entity decoding in reports to prevent misinterpretation
Add validation: Ignore files not referenced in PKGBUILD/Makefile install paths
